title: Maanguyile Poonguyile Lyrics Karagattakaran
stanzas:
Maanguyile poonguyile
seidhi onnu kaelu
unna maalaiyida thaedi
varum naalu endha naalu(2)

muthu muthu kannaala
unna suththi vandhen pinnaala

Maanguyile poonguyile
seidhi onnu kaelu
unna maalaiyida thaedi
varum naalu endha naalu

thottu thottu velakki vachcha
vengalathu sembu, adha
thotteduthu thalaiyil vachchaa
ponguthadi thembu.

patteduthu udithi vantha
paandiyaru thaeru
ippo kitta vandhu kelaruthadi
enna padujoru.

kannukazhagaa ponnu sirichaa
ponnu manasa thottu parichchaa
thannanthaniya enni rasichcha
kannu valathaan vittu virichaa

yaezheduthu paathu yammaa
neereduthu ooththu
seereduthu vaaren
serthu enna serthu

Maanguyile poonguyile
seidhi onnu kaelu
unna maalaiyida thaedi
varum naalu endha naalu

onna marandhirukka
oru pozhudhum ariyaen
yammaa kanni mogaththa
vittu vaeredhuvum theriyaen

pangathila velanja manja
kezhangeduthu urasi
yammaa ingum angum
poosi varum ezhizh irukkum arasi.

koodiyiruppom koondu kiliye
konji kedappom vaadi veliye
jaadi sollithaan paadi azhaichen
sammadhamunnu sollu kiliye

saamathila vaaren
yammaa saamathi poo
thaaren
kovapattu paarthaa
yamma vandha vazhi
poren.

Maanguyile poonguyile
seidhi onnu kaelu
unna maalaiyida thaedi
varum naalu endha naalu(2)

muthu muthu kannaala
unna suththi vandhen pinnaala

Maanguyile poonguyile
seidhi onnu kaelu
unna maalaiyida thaedi
varum naalu endha naalu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of waiting for a loved one.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Karagattakaran.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maanguyile Poonguyile, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and anticipation, waiting for their beloved. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect romantic ballad. It beautifully captures the essence of longing and the joy of love, resonating with anyone who has experienced such emotions. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maanguyile Poonguyile from the Karagattakaran movie is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song transports listeners to a world of love and longing. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: Listen to the news in the evening, it will come on a certain day, which day is it?
I came around you with my beautiful eyes later on.
Listen to the news in the evening, it will come on a certain day, which day is it?
If you touch and place the red flower, it will bloom on your head.
The Pandya king who came with a song is now asking what troubles me.
With beautiful eyes, if a girl smiles, she touches the heart, and if she thinks of herself, she opens her eyes wide.
I will come after looking at the stars, blowing the wind, and mixing together, what will happen?
The pearl will learn to shine, it must be said in the poem.
Listen to the news in the evening, it will come on a certain day, which day is it?
I don't know how to forget you for even a moment, I don't know anything apart from the beautiful girl.
In the crowd, the yellow flower will bloom, and the king will come here and there, there will be a beautiful flower everywhere.
We will stay together, little bird, we will sing and cry, tell me what to do, little bird.
I will come in peace, I will give you a peace flower, if I see anger, I will go away.
The fragrant flower will bloom for me, all the beauty is for you.
Listen to the news in the evening, it will come on a certain day, which day is it?
I came around you with my beautiful eyes later on.
Listen to the news in the evening, it will come on a certain day, which day is it?
